description: Product Description Crosby Instant Water Resistant Shoe Polish Black 100ml - Pack of 2 Over time, shoes can lose their shine and look dull. Karrma Crosby Shoe Polish effectively restores and revitalizes the appearance of your shoes, giving them a polished and professional finish. The compact 100ml bottles of shoe polish are perfect for travel and on-the-go shoe touch-ups. Keep one in your bag, office drawer, or car to ensure your shoes always look impeccable. Whether you're a shoe enthusiast or a professional shoe care provider, the Karrma Crosby Shoe Polish is an excellent addition to your shoe care arsenal. Experience the convenience of instant shine and water resistance, keeping your shoes looking sharp and well-maintained throughout their lifetime. While primarily designed for shoes, this shoe polish can also be used on other leather accessories like belts, wallets, and handbags, providing a consistent black shine across all leather items. Premium Quality Shoe Polish The Crosby Shoe Polish in Black is a high-quality shoe care product designed to provide instant shine and protection to your shoes. Each pack contains two 100ml bottles, ensuring that you have enough polish for multiple applications. Instant Shine This shoe polish is formulated to deliver an instant shine to your shoes, making them look brand new and well-maintained. The black color is perfect for rejuvenating the appearance of black leather or synthetic shoes, bringing out their natural luster. Long-lasting Water Resistance The Karrma Ltd. Crosby Shoe Polish features water-resistant properties, offering protection against light rain, spills, and other moisture. This ensures your shoes remain in good condition and are shielded from potential water damage. Easy Application The shoe polish comes in a user-friendly 100ml bottle, equipped with an applicator cap. This makes it easy to apply the polish directly to the shoes without the need for additional brushes or tools, saving you time and effort. Suitable for Various Shoe Types Whether you have leather dress shoes, casual sneakers, or synthetic shoes, this black shoe polish is suitable for a wide range of shoe materials. It effectively covers scuffs and scratches, extending the life of your favorite footwear.
